subcodes.first_line: Glorified be God, exalted be His majesty, all-encompassing be His bounty, supreme be His might and great be His sovereignty! At times He bestoweth His presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الله جل جلاله و عم نواله و عظم قدرته و کبر سلطانه گاهی لقا میبخشد گاهی
subcodes.subjects: @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @humor; jokes, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world
